summary.key_theme: Amazon 正面臨雲端業務強勁成長與 AI 資本支出激增之間的拉鋸，市場對其長期價值持樂觀態度，但內部勞資糾紛與宏觀經濟帶來的營運成本壓力引發擔憂。

bullish.title: Billionaire Investor Bill Ackman: Buying Microsoft, Meta, and Amazon Today Could Be Like Adding Buffett’s Berkshire Hathaway 25 Years Ago
bullish.reason: 知名投資人 Bill Ackman 將 Amazon 類比為早期的 Berkshire Hathaway，極大提升了機構投資人對其長期成長潛力的信心。

bullish.title: The 4 Best "Magnificent Seven" Stocks to Buy Now — Amazon, Meta Platforms, Microsoft, and Nvidia look underpriced.
bullish.reason: 分析指出 Amazon 目前股價被低估，屬於「七巨頭」中具備買入價值的標的。

bullish.title: History Says This Unstoppable Dow Juggernaut Is a No-Brainer Buy Right Now
bullish.reason: 強調 AWS 與零售業務作為現金流引擎的穩定性，支持長期持有觀點。

bullish.title: Is Amazon Stock a Buy Right Now? — Accelerating cloud growth has the tech giant's profit hitting record levels
bullish.reason: 雲端業務成長加速帶動利潤創下歷史新高，為股價提供強勁基本面支撐。

bullish.title: Amazon Prime Day Returns June 23. Here's Why It Matters More Than Usual This Year.
bullish.reason: 提前舉辦 Prime Day 有助於在消費疲軟環境下提振營收表現。

bullish.title: Good News for NVIDIA, Amazon, and Micron Investors: New Research Shows Trillion-Dollar Stocks May 10X
bullish.reason: 引用外部研究報告，看好大型科技股在 AI 浪潮下的長期爆發力。

bullish.title: Amazon vs. Microsoft: Which Cloud Stock Wins for Patient Investors?
bullish.reason: 針對雲端龍頭的比較分析，肯定了 Amazon 在雲端領域的競爭地位。

bullish.title: Alphabet vs Amazon: Which Is the Better Dip Buy Right Now?
bullish.reason: 探討在股價回調時的買入價值，將 Amazon 列為首選標的之一。

bearish.title: Amazon Confronts AI Spending Strains And US$2.5b Prime Settlement Risks
bearish.reason: 彙整了內部工程師對 AI 資本支出（2000 億美元）的抗議以及 25 億美元的 Prime 相關和解風險，此篇涵蓋面最廣，代表了公司面臨的內憂外患。

bearish.title: Amazon (AMZN) Falls More Steeply Than Broader Market: What Investors Need to Know
bearish.reason: 股價單日下跌 3.06%，表現弱於大盤，反映市場短期賣壓。

bearish.title: Iran war raises shipping costs ahead of Amazon Prime Day, complicating the summer sales event
bearish.reason: 地緣政治導致航運成本上升，直接壓縮 Prime Day 的利潤空間。

bearish.title: Amazon finds itself in hot water over Ring camera feature
bearish.reason: Ring 攝影機功能引發隱私爭議，可能導致品牌形象受損及潛在監管調查。

bearish.title: Amazon-Backed X-Energy Dives, Cathie Wood's ARK Buys
bearish.reason: Amazon 投資的 X-Energy 財報表現不佳導致股價下跌，對 Amazon 投資組合價值造成微幅負面影響。

bearish.title: Top Midday Stories: Lululemon Down After Fiscal Q1 Results; Amazon Engineers Criticize AI Spending
bearish.reason: 市場情緒受負面新聞影響，加劇了投資人對科技巨頭資本支出的擔憂。

bearish.title: Amazon, Microsoft employees demand urgent answers from big tech
bearish.reason: 員工對 7250 億美元資本支出的質疑，反映企業內部治理與資源分配的潛在衝突。

neutral.title: Amazon unveils latest warehouse robot as tech giants continue AI layoffs
neutral.reason: 雖然展示了新機器人技術，但同時伴隨裁員消息，正負抵銷，對股價影響中性。

neutral.title: How many employees does Amazon have in 2026? Its workforce explained
neutral.reason: 僅為對公司員工結構的背景介紹，無實質財務影響。

neutral.title: Best Media Spend Strategies for Amazon Prime Day
neutral.reason: 提供行銷策略建議，屬於產業分析性質，對公司股價無直接驅動。

neutral.title: Update: Market Chatter: Amazon Engineers Criticize Corporate Spending on AI While Cutting Jobs
neutral.reason: 此為針對工程師抗議事件的後續報導，內容與主要負面新聞重複。

neutral.title: Amazon engineers in Seattle slam employer for building AI data centers while laying off 30,000 staffers
neutral.reason: 此為抗議事件的原始報導，已被後續綜合報導涵蓋。
